recommendations.title: Albino Alligator
recommendations.overview: While escaping from a foiled robbery attempt, three thieves find themselves surrounded by police at a New Orleans bar--only they're not the people the police are searching for.

recommendations.title: Baby Driver
recommendations.overview: After being coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver finds himself taking part in a heist doomed to fail.

recommendations.title: Rebel in the Rye
recommendations.overview: The life of celebrated but reclusive author J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel The Catcher in the Rye.

recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: Fabrizio De André: Principe libero
recommendations.overview: A biopic on the personal and artistic life of Italian songwriter Fabrizio De André.

recommendations.title: Dad
recommendations.overview: A busy executive learns during a meeting that his mother may be dying and rushes home to her side. He ends up being his father's caretaker and becomes closer to him than ever before. Estranged from his own son, the executive comes to realize what has

recommendations.title: Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil
recommendations.overview: A visiting city reporter's assignment suddenly revolves around the murder trial of a local millionaire, whom he befriends.

recommendations.title: The Ref
recommendations.overview: A cat burglar is forced to take a bickering, dysfunctional family hostage on Christmas Eve.

recommendations.title: Mia Martini - I Am Mia
recommendations.overview: The movie is a biopic about Mia Martini, an italian singer who died in 1995.

recommendations.title: Tim Maia
recommendations.overview: Biopic of Brazilian singer Tim Maia, from his childhood in Rio de Janeiro until his death at age 55, including his passage by the US, where he discovers a new style of music and is arrested for theft and drug possession.
